articles.title: Jhalmuri, sweets & Rabindranath Tagore: The Bengali factor in BJP's Bengal oath-taking ceremony
articles.excerpt: Suvendu Adhikari took oath as West Bengal's Chief Minister at Kolkata's Brigade Parade Ground. Prime Minister Narendra Modi and other senior BJP leaders attended the historic event. This marks the first time the BJP has formed a government in West Bengal. The…

articles.title: BlackRock doubles down on tokenization with new stablecoin reserve funds
articles.excerpt:
BlackRock's move could centralize stablecoin reserve management, potentially amplifying systemic risks if operational issues arise.
The post BlackRock doubles down on tokenization with new stablecoin reserve funds appeared first on Crypto Briefing.

articles.title: How Putin's regime is throttling the internet in Russia
articles.excerpt: Russian authorities have restricted internet access in parts of the country over the past year and last month blocked access to Telegram, Russia's most popular messenger app. The Kremlin says the measures are needed to stop drone attacks, but a wider strategy…

articles.title: Army destroys shrine, recovers IEDs from IPOB hideout in Enugu
articles.excerpt:
Nigerian Army troops raid a suspected IPOB hideout in Enugu, destroying a shrine and recovering IEDs after an intense gun battle with ESN members.

Read More: https://punchng.com/army-destroys-shrine-recovers-ieds-from-ipob-hideout-in-enugu/
articles.content:
